creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
As Google's MX said,
{{{
<sp1024@gmail.com>: host gmail-smtp-in.l.google.com[173.194.79.27] said:
    550-5.1.1 The email account that you tried to reach does not exist. Please
    try 550-5.1.1 double-checking the recipient's email address for typos or
    550-5.1.1 unnecessary spaces. Learn more at 550 5.1.1
    http://support.google.com/mail/bin/answer.py?answer=6596
    rm6si11896253pbc.305 (in reply to RCPT TO command)
}}}
so, most likely, there could be no reaction from the ticket submitter,
because he won't get notifications about this PR.

But if submitter reads this: please, supply a valid e-mail address.
-- 
Eygene Ryabinkin                                        ,,,^..^,,,
